title: Unit 3: Understanding Flows
content: Order: readings **3.1**, **3.2**, **3.4**; labs **3.1**–**3.5**; unit closes with **3.5 Test Your Knowledge**. **Reading 3.4** is the concept page; **Lab 3.4** is the fill-in practice that follows it, then **Lab 3.5** completes the agent before the knowledge check.
